units.heading: Color contrast
units.text: Body text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5 to 1 against its background. Large text (at least 18pt, or 14pt bold) may use a ratio of 3 to 1.

units.heading: Image alternative text
units.text: Every meaningful image needs concise descriptive alternative text. Decorative images should use an empty alt attribute so screen readers skip them.

units.heading: Heading structure
units.text: Use real heading elements in a logical order without skipping levels. Do not fake headings with bold text, and start page content at heading level two inside Canvas.

units.heading: Link purpose
units.text: Link text must describe its destination on its own. Avoid bare URLs and ambiguous phrases like click here or read more.

units.heading: Data table headers
units.text: Data tables need header cells marked with th and an appropriate scope so assistive technology can associate each cell with its row and column.
